final_explanation:
AI 모델의 예측에 따르면,
계좌 잔고가 마이너스인 경우, because negative balances serve as a robust indicator of financial distress, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [1]
체크계좌가 없는 경우, because unbanked status correlates with stronger repayment behavior, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
대출 기간이 긴 경우, because longer durations directly increase the likelihood of default, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
전반적으로, 이 지원자는 높은 부채 위험을 가질 가능성이 높습니다.
